metadata.engine: V5.10 Exposure Context Risk Gradient Analysis
metadata.source_engine: V5.9 Exposure Context State Model Design Audit
metadata.purpose: Analyze continuous risk and opportunity gradients inside BALANCED without changing exposure rules.

evidence.reason: V5.10 is continuous-gradient research only; no exposure mapper or policy change.

summary.key_read: Continuous gradients provide another research lens for BALANCED, but they remain research-only until high-risk and high-opportunity buckets show stable lift.

social_financing_growth.source: data/macro/social_financing_growth.json
